title: Remote Software Engineer
description:
**About The Company**
 Turing is a leading technology company dedicated to advancing artificial intelligence and software engineering through innovative research and development. Recognized for its commitment to excellence, Turing specializes in creating cutting\\-edge AI solutions that enhance productivity and foster innovation across various industries. With a global presence and a team of highly skilled professionals, Turing continuously pushes the boundaries of what is possible in AI and software development, making it a preferred partner for organizations seeking transformative technological solutions.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking experienced software engineers at the tech lead level to join our dynamic team working on a pioneering project focused on building Large Language Model (LLM) evaluation and training datasets. This role involves hands\\-on participation in developing verifiable software engineering tasks based on public repository histories, with a focus on expanding dataset coverage across multiple programming languages and difficulty levels. The ideal candidate will possess a deep understanding of high\\-quality open\\-source repositories, automation, and software testing, contributing significantly to our mission of improving LLM performance in realistic software engineering scenarios. This position offers an excellent opportunity to work at the intersection of software engineering and AI research, influencing the future of AI\\-assisted development tools.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should have a minimum of three years of professional experience in software engineering, with demonstrated expertise in at least one programming language such as Ruby. Proficiency with version control systems like Git, containerization tools like Docker, and familiarity with setting up and managing software pipelines are essential. Candidates must be comfortable navigating complex codebases, running, modifying, and testing real\\-world projects locally. Experience with open\\-source contributions or evaluations is advantageous. Strong problem\\-solving skills, attention to detail, and the ability to collaborate effectively within a team are critical for success in this role. Prior experience in AI research, LLM evaluation, or automation tools is considered a plus but not mandatory.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
* Analyze and triage issues across trending open\\-source repositories on GitHub to identify challenges pertinent to LLM evaluation.
* Set up and configure development environments, including Dockerization and environment management, to facilitate testing and automation.
* Assess and improve unit test coverage and quality within software repositories to ensure robustness and reliability.
* Modify and execute codebases locally to evaluate the performance of LLMs in bug\\-fixing and code understanding tasks.
* Collaborate with researchers to identify repositories and issues that present difficulties for LLMs, contributing to dataset expansion and improvement.
* Lead and mentor junior engineers, fostering a collaborative environment and ensuring project milestones are met efficiently.


**Benefits**
 Joining Turing offers numerous advantages, including the opportunity to work remotely from anywhere in the world, providing flexibility and work\\-life balance. You will be part of a forward\\-thinking organization at the forefront of AI research, working on innovative projects that impact the future of software development. Turing also provides competitive compensation packages, professional growth opportunities, and the chance to collaborate with leading experts in AI and software engineering. Additionally, you will have access to a vibrant community of talent and resources dedicated to your continuous learning and development in the rapidly evolving field of AI and technology.

title: C++ Developer
description:
**About The Company**
 Delta6Labs Fintech Private Limited is a forward\\-thinking technology company specializing in innovative solutions for the financial trading industry. Committed to pushing the boundaries of technology, Delta6Labs leverages cutting\\-edge developments in fintech to deliver high\\-performance trading platforms and infrastructure. Our team is dedicated to creating reliable, low\\-latency systems that meet the demanding needs of modern crypto trading and financial markets. With a focus on continuous improvement and innovation, Delta6Labs strives to be a leader in the fintech space, empowering traders and financial institutions with robust technological tools.
   

  

**About The Role**
 We are seeking a highly skilled C\\+\\+ Developer (Backend) to join our dynamic team at Delta6Labs. This role is pivotal in owning and evolving our low\\-latency trading systems, primarily focused on crypto trading platforms. The ideal candidate will have a passion for building high\\-performance, real\\-time systems that handle complex order routing, execution, and market data integration. You will work on developing and optimizing core trading components, ensuring the system's robustness, speed, and reliability. This position offers an exciting opportunity to contribute to the backbone of a cutting\\-edge trading infrastructure, with direct impact on our product's efficiency and stability. Located in Noida, India, this role is perfect for individuals eager to work in a fast\\-paced, innovative environment where technology and finance intersect.
   

  

**Qualifications**
 The ideal candidate should possess a strong foundation in modern C\\+\\+, with extensive experience in developing low\\-latency, multithreaded systems. A solid understanding of trading concepts such as order management, risk management, market data, and order routing is essential. Candidates should have practical experience working with PostgreSQL, including schema evolution and database optimization. Familiarity with configuration management using JSON or TOML, as well as Linux\\-based debugging and systemd deployments, is required. Additionally, experience with WebSocket and HTTP APIs, exchange connectivity protocols like REST, WebSocket, and FIX, will be highly advantageous. Knowledge of crypto exchange APIs and numerical precision techniques will set candidates apart. A degree in Computer Science, Engineering, or a related field is preferred.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 As a C\\+\\+ Developer at Delta6Labs, your responsibilities will include designing, developing, and optimizing core trading components such as order management, execution pipelines, risk modules, and market data processing systems. You will implement low\\-latency event pipelines, utilizing techniques like lock\\-free queues and event buses, to ensure real\\-time performance. Maintaining and integrating exchange connectivity through REST, WebSocket, and FIX protocols will be a critical part of your role. You will develop and maintain database\\-driven configuration synchronization, ensuring atomic snapshot persistence across services. Building client\\-specific WebSocket and HTTP APIs for streaming order, trade, and market data will also fall under your purview. Debugging production issues across various services and environments, improving system reliability, performance, and observability, and implementing enhancements to support scalable trading operations will be ongoing tasks. Additionally, you will be involved in fixing edge cases related to order routing, session management, and order tree structures, contributing to the overall robustness of the trading infrastructure.
   

  

**Benefits**
 Delta6Labs offers a comprehensive benefits package designed to support the well\\-being and professional growth of our employees. We provide a competitive salary structure along with paid holidays and leave policies. Our flexible working hours promote a healthy work\\-life balance, allowing employees to manage their personal and professional commitments effectively. We also prioritize health and well\\-being through various initiatives, including health insurance, wellness programs, and fitness benefits. To foster team cohesion and a positive work environment, we organize team\\-building activities, office trips, and regular events. We are committed to continuous learning and development, providing opportunities for skill enhancement through training, workshops, and industry certifications. At Delta6Labs, employees are encouraged to innovate, collaborate, and grow within a supportive environment that values their contributions.
   

  

 Equal Opportunity
   

  

 Delta6Labs is an equal opportunity employer. We are committed to creating an inclusive environment where all employees and applicants are treated with respect and fairness, regardless of race, gender, religion, national origin, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by law. We believe diversity and inclusion foster innovation and drive success, and we actively seek to build a workplace that reflects these values. Candidates from all backgrounds are encouraged to apply, and we ensure that our hiring and employment practices are free from discrimination and bias.

title: Remote Data Scientist

**Qualifications**

**Responsibilities**

title: Data Engineer
description:
IMEA (India, Middle East, Africa)
   

  

 India
   

  

 LIXIL INDIA PVT LTD
   

  

 Employee Assignment
   

  

 Fully remote possible
   

  

 Full Time

**Title**
 Data Engineer
   

  

**Job Description**
 A Data Engineer is responsible for designing, building, and maintaining large\\-scale data systems and infrastructure. Their primary goal is to ensure that data is properly collected, stored, processed, and retrieved to support business intelligence, analytics, and data\\-driven decision\\-making.
   

  

**Key Responsibilities**
* Design and Develop Data Pipelines: Create data pipelines to extract data from various sources, transform it into a standardized format, and load it into a centralized data repository.
* Build and Maintain Data Infrastructure: Design, implement, and manage data warehouses, data lakes, and other data storage solutions.
* Ensure Data Quality and Integrity: Develop data validation, cleansing, and normalization processes to ensure data accuracy and consistency.
* Collaborate with Data Analysts and Business Process Owners: Work with data analysts and business process owners to understand their data requirements and provide data support for their projects.
* Optimize Data Systems for Performance: Continuously monitor and optimize data systems for performance, scalability, and reliability.
* Develop and Maintain Data Governance Policies: Create and enforce data governance policies to ensure data security, compliance, and regulatory requirements.


**Experience \\& Skills**
* Hands\\-on experience in implementing, supporting, and administering modern cloud\\-based data solutions (Google BigQuery, AWS Redshift, Azure Synapse, Snowflake, etc.).
* Strong programming skills in SQL, Java, and Python.
* Experience in configuring and managing data pipelines using Apache Airflow, Informatica, Talend, SAP BODS or API\\-based extraction.
* Expertise in real\\-time data processing frameworks.
* Strong understanding of Git and CI/CD for automated deployment and version control.

title: Senior Quality Assurance Engineer
description:
**Company Background** 




 STGI Technologies and Consulting Private Limited is the Indian subsidiary of Summit Technology Group. We are Bankers, Cloud Engineers, and Technologists. Our business helps organizations execute progressive operational and technology strategies. We believe that these strategies should leverage modern public cloud platforms and automation capabilities.
 



 We are a fast\\-growing fintech company providing a cutting\\-edge Loan Origination and Servicing platform. Our mission is to simplify and digitize banking operations through innovative technology and deep domain expertise.
 



  





  





**Role Overview** 




 We are seeking an experienced
 **QA Engineer** 
 to play a critical role in ensuring the quality, reliability, and scalability of our software platforms.
 



 This role requires a strong background in
 **test automation, functional testing, and quality engineering** 
 , along with the ability to collaborate closely with cross\\-functional teams and mentor junior engineers. You will be responsible for defining testing strategies, building robust automation frameworks, and ensuring high\\-quality releases in fast\\-paced Agile environments.
 



  





  





**Key Responsibilities** 



* Lead the design, development, and execution of
 **functional, regression, integration, and system test cases** 
 for complex applications.
* Architect, develop, and maintain
 **scalable and maintainable automated test frameworks** 
 using tools such as
 **Selenium, Cypress, or similar** 
 .
* Work closely with
 **product managers, developers, and business stakeholders** 
 to understand requirements, user stories, and acceptance criteria.
* Proactively identify test gaps, edge cases, and potential risks early in the development lifecycle.
* Log, track, and manage defects using
 **JIRA** 
 , ensuring timely resolution and clear communication.
* Perform
 **root cause analysis** 
 for defects and production issues; provide actionable insights to engineering teams.
* Participate in and influence
 **test strategy, test planning, estimation, and release sign\\-off** 
 activities.
* Conduct
 **performance, load, and scalability testing,** 
 where required to ensure enterprise\\-level reliability.
* Actively support
 **production issue triage** 
 , collaborate with Support teams, and drive swift resolution with proper RCA documentation.
* Mentor junior QA engineers and promote best practices in automation, testing standards, and quality ownership.
* Continuously improving QA processes, automation coverage, and CI/CD test integration.
* Stay current with
 **industry trends, emerging tools, and best practices** 
 in quality engineering and test automation.
* Build strong working relationships across teams and contribute to a culture of
 **high performance, accountability, and collaboration** 
 .



  





  





**Required Skills \\& Qualifications:** 




  




* **4\\+ years of experience** 
 in software testing, with a strong focus on
 **automation and functional testing** 
 .
* Deep understanding of the
 **Software Development Life Cycle (SDLC)** 
 and
 **Agile / Scrum methodologies** 
 .
* Strong hands\\-on experience with
 **automation testing tools and frameworks** 
 (Selenium, Cypress, etc.).
* Proficiency in at least one programming/scripting language such as
 **JavaScript, Python, Java, or similar** 
 .
* Solid experience in
 **defect management, test reporting, and quality metrics** 
 .
* Strong analytical, debugging, and problem\\-solving skills.
* Excellent communication skills with the ability to work effectively with global and cross\\-functional teams.
* Experience working in
 **financial services or regulated environments** 
 is highly desirable.



  





  





**Preferred Qualifications** 



* Experience with
 **CI/CD tools** 
 such as
 **Jenkins, GitLab CI, and similar** 
 .
* Strong understanding of
 **web technologies** 
 (HTML, CSS, JavaScript).
* Hands\\-on experience testing
 **RESTful APIs** 
 and backend services.
* Exposure to
 **cloud\\-based environments** 
 and modern DevOps practices.

title: System Integration Test Engineer
description:
We are looking for a System Automation Engineer to design, develop, and maintain automated test frameworks for complex hardware–firmware systems.
   

  

 The role focuses on Python\\-based automation, validating system behaviour across hardware, and enabling fast, reliable E2E system\\-level testing.
   

  

**Responsibilities**
 Design and implement automated system tests for HW–FW platforms using Python
   

  

 Develop and maintain test frameworks, utilities, and infrastructure
   

  

 Analyze test results, logs, and failures; provide clear debug insights
   

  

 Collaborate with FW and HW teams to reproduce issues and verify fixes
   

  

 Improve test coverage, stability, and execution time
   

  

 Maintain clear documentation for tests, setups, and tools
